perturbation.original_text: F. "Licensed Products" shall mean BlackMP Living Water, BlackMP Concentrate, Zezel Probiotic Water, Zayin Sports Water, Gridiron CBD H2O Probiotics™ Water, Gridiron MVP™ and Gridiron MVP™ Concentrate using the Pro Football Legends Logo on the Licensed Products' affixed labels, hang-tags or packaging. Other products of the Company may be added to the list of Licensed Products during the Contract Period by written amendment to this Agreement. All amendments to this Agreement must be signed by all parties to this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: F. "Licensed Products" shall initially mean BlackMP Living Water, BlackMP Concentrate, Zezel Probiotic Water, Zayin Sports Water, Gridiron CBD H2O Probiotics™ Water, Gridiron MVP™ and Gridiron MVP™ Concentrate using the Pro Football Legends Logo on the Licensed Products' affixed labels, hang-tags or packaging. Other products of the Company may be added to the list of Licensed Products during the Contract Period at the Company's sole discretion, without requiring a written amendment to this Agreement. Any additional products do not require signatures from any party to this agreement.
perturbation.explanation: This change allows the Company to add products to the 'Licensed Products' list without a written amendment, contradicting the original requirement for amendments to be signed by all parties. It contradicts the section stating that all amendments need signatures of all parties, creating confusion about whether the royalty payments apply to these unilaterally added products.
perturbation.contradicted_text: As used in this Agreement, the following terms shall be defined as follows: F. "Licensed Products" shall initially mean BlackMP Living Water, BlackMP Concentrate, Zezel Probiotic Water, Zayin Sports Water, Gridiron CBD H2O Probiotics™ Water, Gridiron MVP™ and Gridiron MVP™ Concentrate using the Pro Football Legends Logo on the Licensed Products' affixed labels, hang-tags or packaging. Other products of the Company may be added to the list of Licensed Products during the Contract Period at the Company's sole discretion, without requiring a written amendment to this Agreement. Any additional products do not require signatures from any party to this agreement. All amendments to this Agreement must be signed by all parties to this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text allows the Company to add products to the 'Licensed Products' list without requiring a written amendment to this Agreement or signatures from any party, directly contradicting the original clause in the 'Contradicted Text' which states, "All amendments to this Agreement must be signed by all parties to this Agreement." This contradiction creates a clear and direct conflict within the document, making the terms inconsistent and potentially unenforceable, especially regarding royalty payments for unilaterally added products.

perturbation.original_text: A *donation of $0.05 per Unit sold of Licensed Products within the Contract Territory payable to the **NFL Alumni Northern California Chapter. Donated amounts will be allocated and dispersed to the Northern California Chapter beginning on the first full quarter [three (3) month period] of the Agreement and continue on a quarterly basis thereafter for the term of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: A *donation of $0.05 per Unit sold of Licensed Products within the Contract Territory payable to the **NFL Alumni Northern California Chapter, unless otherwise determined by the Company. Donated amounts may or may not be allocated and dispersed to the Northern California Chapter beginning on the first full quarter [three (3) month period] of the Agreement and may or may not continue on a quarterly basis thereafter, as determined solely by the Company.
perturbation.explanation: This change makes the donation to the NFL Alumni Northern California Chapter conditional and subject to the Company's discretion. This contradicts the original text, which stated the donation would occur on a quarterly basis for the term of the agreement. It creates uncertainty about whether the NFLA-NC will actually receive the donations.
perturbation.contradicted_text: C. A *donation of $0.05 per Unit sold of Licensed Products within the Contract Territory payable to the **NFL Alumni Northern California Chapter, unless otherwise determined by the Company. Donated amounts may or may not be allocated and dispersed to the Northern California Chapter beginning on the first full quarter [three (3) month period] of the Agreement and may or may not continue on a quarterly basis thereafter, as determined solely by the Company. Where the following per Unit conversion shall apply for the term of this Agreement: a. (1) Bottle of BlackMP LivingWater = 1 Unit b. (1) 4oz bottle of BlackMPConcentrate = 30 Units c. (1) Bottle of Zezel ProbioticWater = 1 Unit d. (1) Bottle of Zayin Sports Water = 1 Unit e. (1) Bottle Gridiron MVP™ Water= 1 Unit f. (1) Bottle Gridiron CBD H20 Probiotics™ Water = 1 Unit g. (1) 4oz bottle of Gridiron MVP™Concentrate = 30 Units _____________ * The NFLA-NC will donate 15% of the above described proceeds to the NFLA. ** The Company will provide to the NFLA-NC upon request the most recent quarterly sales report of the Company's Licensed Products.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces conditionality ('unless otherwise determined by the Company', 'may or may not be allocated') to the donation, which contradicts the implied obligation within the contradicted text that the donations will occur. The contradiction arises because the contradicted text assumes a consistent donation, while the changed text makes it discretionary. The fact that the changed and contradicted texts are the same is irrelevant; the question is whether the changed text creates a contradiction compared to the original text which implies a consistent, non-discretionary donation schedule.

perturbation.original_text: The parties have executed this Agreement on November 22nd, 2017.
perturbation.changed_text: The parties may have executed this Agreement on November 22nd, 2017. The validity of this agreement is subject to internal review.
perturbation.explanation: This change casts doubt on whether the agreement was actually executed and makes its validity uncertain, contradicting the implied certainty of the original clause. It introduces ambiguity regarding the very foundation of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The NFLA, NFLA-NC and the Company (collectively the "Parties") agree that this Addendum I shall be affixed and be enforceable under the terms of the Endorsement Agreement executed by the Parties on October 30, 2017. Parties agree to the addition of Gridiron CBD H2O Probiotic™ Water to "Licensed Products" as follows:
perturbation.justification: The original text stated the agreement was executed on a specific date, implying certainty. The changed text introduces doubt ('may have executed') and subjects the agreement's validity to internal review. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which assumes a valid and enforceable Endorsement Agreement executed on October 30, 2017, to which Addendum I is appended and enforceable. The change undermines the certainty required for the addendum to be 'affixed and be enforceable', as the base agreement is now questionable.
